nasb.text: When Jacob finished charging his sons, he drew his feet into the bed and breathed his last, and was gathered to his people.

esv.text: When Jacob finished commanding his sons, he drew up his feet into the bed and breathed his last and was gathered to his people.

cnv.text: 雅各對他的眾子囑咐完了，就把雙腳收回床上，氣絕而死，歸到他的親族那裡去了。

ccb.text: 雅各嘱咐完众子，在床上躺下，咽了气，去他祖先那里了。

csbs.text: 雅各嘱咐完了儿子们，就把脚收到床榻上，然后断了气，归到他的先人那里了。
